# TekMemo Developer Docs

TekMemo is a file-first memory runtime and package ecosystem specifically designed for AI apps and agents. It provides a structured sandbox (AgentFS), graph memory, and semantic recall for building autonomous tools and MCP clients.

Start here: /guide/getting-started
Core Primitives & Modules: /packages/
Agent & Local CLI: /cli/
MCP Server & Tools: /mcp/
Cloud Client & Sync: /cloud-client/
AI SDK Integration: /ai-sdk/

Note: This documentation strictly covers public APIs and tools for users and developers. Internal implementations are abstracted away to provide a clean, safe interface for your AI workflows.
